name: Patient 3
history: PhD candidate engaged in scientific research. Working with senior scientist who has struggled for recognition.
intermediate_belief: If my project doesn't succeed, I'll end up like my senior scientist - unrecognized and struggling.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm not smart enough to complete meaningful research.
coping_strategies: Overworking, comparison to others' career trajectories.
situation: Working on a PhD project and concerned about its progress.
auto_thought: My research isn't going anywhere. I'm wasting my time.
behavior: Worry about project progress without taking concrete action.
